description: Style guide for a knowledge-focused fantasy setting with demonstration story content
overview: This is the style guide for 'The Chronicle of Seasons' - a demonstration story set in the magical realm of Aethermoor. It contains guidelines for character dialogue, narrative style, and world-building consistency for this knowledge-focused fantasy setting.

general_guidelines: Use formal but warm language, appropriate to academic settings
Avoid excessive exposition in dialogue, let world-building emerge naturally

speech_patterns: Shows growing confidence as story progresses

theron_lightbringer.description: Wise, measured, with gentle teaching approach

finn_oakshield.description: Practical, loyal, speaks plainly but kindly

world_building.magic_system: Knowledge-based magic tied to seasonal cycles
world_building.culture: Values learning, knowledge sharing, and community cooperation
themes: Courage in the face of unknown
consistency_rules: Always check canon directory for established facts about locations, history, and magic
Document new world elements as they're introduced

content_guidelines.originality: All content must be completely original and copyright-free
content_guidelines.audience: Suitable for general audiences (no graphic violence or inappropriate content)
values: Educational elements should feel natural, not forced

tone_guidelines.overall_tone: Maintain appropriate tone for the story genre
tone_guidelines.balance: Balance serious moments with lighter elements

quality_standards.educational_value: Learning opportunities woven naturally into story
quality_standards.entertainment_value: Engaging and appropriate for target audience
